prompt: The interior of a [light-defining architectural space] — [lens] wide from a position that maximises the visibility of [light entry element], the [light quality] entering and transforming the interior surface it falls on: [surface receiving light] visible in [what the light does to the surface], [spatial geometry] establishing the architecture's relationship to light as its primary design intention, [human scale element] establishing scale, no furniture or objects competing — only the space and the light it was designed to receive, architectural light photography still, 16:9 Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
